mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order ( order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, paid_at ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{paidAt} )

INSERT INTO order_item ( order_id, sku_id, spu_id, sku_code, spu_code, product_name, category_name, color, size, sale_price, quantity, line_amount, main_image_url ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.spuId}, #{item.skuCode}, #{item.spuCode}, #{item.productName}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.color}, #{item.size}, #{item.salePrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.lineAmount}, #{item.mainImageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, paid_at, closed_at, close_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM sales_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, paid_at, closed_at, close_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM sales_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT id, order_id, sku_id, spu_id, sku_code, spu_code, product_name, category_name, color, size, sale_price, quantity, line_amount, main_image_url, created_at FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
